registration.guardianRequired: The registrant is a minor. Parent/guardian information is required.
registration.guardianInfoTitle: Guardian who attends camp meeting Information
registration.consentIntro: By signing this form, I confirm the following:
registration.consent1: I authorize my child to attend the camp meeting unaccompanied by me or another legal guardian.
registration.consent2: I understand that my child will be under the supervision of the camp meeting organizers and adult volunteers/staff.
registration.consent3: I give permission for the camp meeting organizers to direct, supervise, and make reasonable decisions regarding the care and behavior of my child during the event.
registration.consent4: I acknowledge that I have provided all relevant medical, allergy, or emergency contact information necessary for the safety and well-being of my child.
registration.consent5: I release and hold harmless the camp meeting organizers, staff, and volunteers from any liability that may arise during the course of this camp meeting, except in cases of gross negligence or willful misconduct.
registration.consentCheckRep: I understand that the registrant is a minor. I confirm that the parent/guardian listed above has authorized this minor to serve as the group representative, and I consent to the parent/guardian being contacted in case of any issues or emergencies.
registration.consentCheckMember: I understand that the registrant is a minor. I confirm that the parent/guardian listed above has authorized this minor to attend the camp meeting, and I consent to the parent/guardian being contacted in case of any issues or emergencies.
registration.dateChangePolicyWarning: You are about to change this person's stay dates to differ from the group.
registration.dateChangePolicyViolation: The dates you select must accurately reflect this person's actual attendance. Any discrepancy between the registered dates and actual attendance is a violation of camp policy.
registration.dateChangePolicyAgree: I confirm that the dates I am selecting accurately reflect this person's actual attendance.
registration.valDobInvalid: Enter a valid date of birth
registration.valRepMinAge: Representative must be at least 11 years old

payment.zelleWarning: Your registration will remain in "Pending Payment" status until your Zelle payment is received and verified. This may take 1-3 business days. Room assignments will not be made until payment is confirmed.
payment.checkDesc: Check payments are processed manually. Your registration will be held until payment is received and confirmed by our team.
payment.checkWarning: Your registration will remain in "Pending Payment" status until your check is received and verified. This may take 5-10 business days. Room assignments will not be made until payment is confirmed.
payment.checkAgree: I agree to mail a check for {amount} payable to ECKCM with confirmation code {code} on the memo line.
payment.zelleAgree: I agree to send the Zelle payment of {amount} with the memo/note shown above.

payment.zelleSubmitted: Registration submitted! Please send your Zelle payment.

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Find answers to common questions or get in touch with us.
support.registrationDesc: Help with signing up and event registration
support.paymentsDesc: Questions about fees, receipts, and refunds
support.epassDesc: Issues with your digital event pass
support.faqRegister: How do I register for an event?
support.faqRegisterAnswer: Sign in to your account and go to the Dashboard. You will see active events listed with a "Register Now" button. Follow the steps to complete your registration.
support.faqRegisterOthers: Can I register on behalf of someone else?
support.faqRegisterOthersAnswer: Yes. On the Dashboard, click "Register for Someone Else" under the event. The registration will be linked to your account, but the participants you add will be registered separately.
support.faqEpass: How do I access my E-Pass?
support.faqEpassAnswer: After completing registration, go to the E-Pass section from your Dashboard. You can also access your E-Pass directly from the link sent to your email. Show the QR code at check-in.
support.faqReceipt: Where can I find my receipt?
support.faqReceiptAnswer: Go to the Receipts section from your Dashboard to view and download receipts for all your registrations.
support.faqEdit: Can I edit my registration after submitting?
support.faqEditAnswer: Please contact our support team for any changes to your registration after submission.
support.faqCancel: How do I cancel my registration?
support.faqCancelAnswer: To cancel a registration, please contact our support team directly. Refund policies vary by event.
support.generalInquiriesDesc: For general questions, please email us and we will respond as soon as possible.
